---
title: "Water Permanence Classification"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
params:
  project_id: "PROJECT_ID"
  water_threshold_ndwi: 0.0   # NDWI threshold for water/not-water classification
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
```

## Load imagery catalogue

```{r load}
catalogue <- readRDS(here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_imagery_catalogue.rds")))
```

## Classify water pixels per scene (NDWI approach)

```{r classify-water}
# NDWI = (Green - NIR) / (Green + NIR); values > threshold = water
# Band assignments will vary by sensor — adjust band numbers below

classify_scene <- function(raster_path, threshold = params$water_threshold_ndwi) {
  r      <- terra::rast(raster_path)
  green  <- r[[2]]   # adjust band index to match sensor
  nir    <- r[[4]]   # adjust band index to match sensor
  ndwi   <- (green - nir) / (green + nir)
  water  <- ndwi > threshold
  names(water) <- "water"
  water
}

# TODO: apply classify_scene() across catalogue$path
# water_masks <- lapply(catalogue$path, classify_scene)
```

## Aggregate water frequency across time series

```{r water-frequency}
# Stack all binary water masks and compute proportion of scenes with water present
# water_stack <- terra::rast(water_masks)
# water_freq  <- mean(water_stack)   # 0 = never wet; 1 = always wet
```

## Classify permanence classes

```{r permanence-class}
# Thresholds below are indicative — refine against ABWRET-A / GWPWB criteria.
# GWPWB classes (duration wet per year): Ephemeral <7d, Temporary 1-4 wk,
# Seasonal 5-17 wk, Semi-Permanent 18-40 wk, Intermittent 41-51 wk,
# Permanent 52 wk.
# permanence_class <- classify(water_freq, matrix(c(
#   0.000, 0.019, 1,   # Ephemeral      ( <7 days  / 52 wk)
#   0.019, 0.077, 2,   # Temporary      ( 1- 4 wk  / 52 wk)
#   0.077, 0.327, 3,   # Seasonal       ( 5-17 wk  / 52 wk)
#   0.327, 0.769, 4,   # Semi-Permanent (18-40 wk  / 52 wk)
#   0.769, 0.981, 5,   # Intermittent   (41-51 wk  / 52 wk)
#   0.981, 1.000, 6    # Permanent      (52 wk     / 52 wk)
# ), ncol = 3, byrow = TRUE))
```

## Join climate context (antecedent precipitation)

```{r join-climate}
# TODO: for each imagery scene, extract 30-day antecedent precipitation
# to flag scenes captured during anomalously wet or dry periods
```

## Save outputs

```{r save}
# terra::writeRaster(water_freq,       here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_water_freq.tif")), overwrite = TRUE)
# terra::writeRaster(permanence_class, here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_permanence_class.tif")), overwrite = TRUE)
message("Water permanence transform complete — uncomment raster operations once input data is available.")
```
